title: Fix post-registration navigation to immediately open chat list

requirements.text: In App.tsx and RegistrationScreen.tsx, fix the post-registration navigation flow so that immediately after a successful createUser call, the app transitions directly to the chat list (main screen) without any intermediate steps, loading screens, or delays. The currentUser/profile state must be updated synchronously or before the navigation check runs, so the app never loops back to the registration screen or gets stuck on a loading state.

quotes: once account created successfully app should open chat list main page directly

acceptanceCriteria: After submitting the registration form and receiving a successful response from createUser, the app immediately renders the chat list screen.
The user is never shown a loading screen or redirected back to the registration screen after successful account creation.
The currentUser/profile state is populated before the navigation logic evaluates which screen to show.
If registration fails, the user remains on the registration screen and sees a readable error message.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Changing the registration form fields or validation logic.
Altering the chat list screen UI.
